name: Shark Kids' Shower Curtain - Pillowfort™
description: Your kid will dive into the sea each time they shower with the Shark Shower Curtain from Pillowfort™. Made from twill fabric, the shark shower curtain gracefully encloses a bathtub or shower stall for added privacy, and it comes with a buttonhole top that allows for easy installation. The shower curtain boasts an allover shark graphic for fun flair, and is machine washable for a quick refresh whenever needed.
